thresholdSource: criticalLow 0.5 (x10^3/uL): StatPearls defines severe neutropenia as ANC < 0.5 x10^9/L, the tier carrying high risk of bacterial/fungal infection ("Neutropenia," StatPearls, NCBI Bookshelf NBK507702).
